findings.description: Section s4 (1画面にすべての検索結果を一覧表示する場合の実装方法) is missing PascalCase class names and annotation names that appear in the source code examples: `UserSearchAction` (class extending DbAccessSupport), `DbAccessSupport` (base class), and `@OnError` (annotation on the Action method). These are explicitly present in the source's Java examples for this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows: `public class UserSearchAction extends DbAccessSupport { ... @OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "/ss11AC/W11AC0101.jsp") public HttpResponse doUSERS00101(...)`

findings.description: Section s5 (検索結果の一覧表示機能のデフォルト値設定) is missing `UserSearchAction` and `DbAccessSupport` — both appear in the source's code example that demonstrates per-function override of max and maxResultCount settings.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows: `public class UserSearchAction extends DbAccessSupport { private static final int MAX_ROWS = 10; private static final int MAX_RESULT_COUNT = 50; ... condition.setMax(MAX_ROWS); condition.setMaxResultCount(MAX_RESULT_COUNT); }`
